name: search_emails
description: Search for emails in the inbox based on query criteria and return matching thread information

max_results.description: Maximum number of emails to return

implementation_notes: Use the Gmail API (google-api-python-client). Authenticate via OAuth2. Call users().messages().list(q=query). Iterate through results to fetch message details using users().messages().get(). Return a list of objects containing 'id', 'threadId', 'subject', and 'snippet'. Catch HttpError and return error.
